# UC-22.55.18 · CLC/TS 50701 Safety-Standards Coordination — every cyber control change re-evaluated against EN 50126/8/9/EN 50657

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Configuration &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Every cyber-security change to our railway must also be checked by safety experts against railway safety rulebooks (EN 50126/8/9/657). We track each rule-check; if any is missing, the team is alerted.*

---

## Description

Verifies cyber control changes are coordinated with EN 50126/8/9 and EN 50657 safety standards.

## Value

Without safety-standards coordination, cyber changes can compromise rail safety certifications. This UC enforces the linkage.

## Implementation

(1) Maintain `rail_safety_coord_lookup`. (2) Head of Safety + ISA reviewers sign per applicable standard. (3) Schedule UC-22.55.18 weekly Monday 07:00.

## Evidence

Saved search `UC-22.55.18` archived weekly to `audit_evidence` with `clc_clause="CLC-TS-50701-c10-1"`. Every row pins (change_id, change_description, en_50126_assessment_at, en_50128_assessment_at, en_50129_assessment_at, en_50657_assessment_at, isa_concurrence_at, isa_concurrence_signed_by, coord_status). Dashboard `CLC/TS 50701 — Safety Standards Coordination` shows coordination posture.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Implement a cyber control change without `en_50126_assessment_at`. UC-22.55.18 MUST flag `coord_status="en_50126_missing"`.

### Negative scenario

Run EN 50126/8/9/657 assessments per applicability; ISA concurs. UC-22.55.18 MUST record `coord_status="compliant"`.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise ≥9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- KV Store `rail_safety_coord_lookup`.
- Head of Safety and ISA roles defined.

## Step 1 — Coordination collection

```ini
[rail_safety_coord_lookup]
enforceTypes = true
field.change_id = string
field.change_description = string
field.change_implemented_at = number
field.en_50126_applicable = bool
field.en_50128_applicable = bool
field.en_50129_applicable = bool
field.en_50657_applicable = bool
field.en_50126_assessment_at = number
field.en_50128_assessment_at = number
field.en_50129_assessment_at = number
field.en_50657_assessment_at = number
field.isa_required = bool
field.isa_concurrence_at = number
field.isa_concurrence_signed_by = string
```

## Step 2 — Search and alert

```ini
[UC-22.55.18: CLC/TS 50701 Safety Standards Coordination]
cron_schedule = 0 7 * * 1
dispatch.earliest_time = -1y@y
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, notable
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.55.18,reg=CLC-TS-50701,clause=CLC-TS-50701-c10-1
action.notable.param.rule_title = Rail safety-standards coordination gap
action.notable.param.security_domain = audit
action.notable.param.severity = high
alert.severity = 4
```

## Step 3 — Operationalize

**Runbook for any `*_missing`** (owner: Head of Safety, severity P2): complete assessment; sign; record.

## Step 4 — Troubleshooting

**CLC/TS 50701-specific failure modes**:

- **EN 50128 software-safety reviews** can take weeks; track schedule.
- **ISA independence**: ISA must be independent of engineering and operations.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup rail_safety_coord_lookup
| where change_implemented_at IS NOT NULL
| eval coord_status = case(
    en_50126_applicable=true AND isnull(en_50126_assessment_at), "en_50126_missing",
    en_50128_applicable=true AND isnull(en_50128_assessment_at), "en_50128_missing",
    en_50129_applicable=true AND isnull(en_50129_assessment_at), "en_50129_missing",
    en_50657_applicable=true AND isnull(en_50657_assessment_at), "en_50657_missing",
    isa_required=true AND isnull(isa_concurrence_at), "isa_concurrence_missing",
    1=1, "compliant")
| where coord_status != "compliant"
| table change_id change_description en_50126_assessment_at en_50128_assessment_at en_50129_assessment_at en_50657_assessment_at isa_concurrence_at coord_status
```

## Visualization

(Panel 1) Coordination posture per change. (Panel 2) Missing-assessment queue. (Panel 3) ISA-pending queue.

## Known False Positives

1. **Phased change** — multi-phase change with phased safety assessments. Suppression: track per-phase status.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `clc_22_55_18_exceptions` with documented Head-of-Safety approval and 30-day maximum grant.

## References

- [CLC/TS 50701:2021 clause 10.1](https://standards.cencenelec.eu/dyn/www/f?p=205:110:0::::FSP_ORG_ID,FSP_PROJECT:1258376,73987)
- [EN 50126/8/9 family of rail-safety standards](https://www.cenelec.eu/)
